description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet.Product Details Three fold textured brown leather wallet with top stitch detail and embossed branding on the frontTwo main compartmentsFour credit card slots and an id card slot on the leftThree credit card slots and two slip pockets in the centre with a zippered pocketCoin pocket on right with slip pocketWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlightSize 12 cm x 9.5 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
